basic_details.job_title: CSIR CSMCRI – Project Assistant, Project Associate and More – 62 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central Salt & Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI) Recruitment 2026 for 62 posts of Various Project Positions. Candidates with B.Sc, M.Sc, Ph.D, B.E./B.Tech Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CSIR CSMCRI official website csmcri.res.in.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Chemistry/Physics/Marine Sciences, M.Sc. Chemistry/Botany/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Biochemistry/Environmental Sciences/Marine Sciences, B.E./B.Tech Chemical/IT/CS/Civil/Mechanical/Electronics & Communication, Ph.D. in Biological/Chemical/Pharmaceutical/Agricultural Sciences

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CSIR CSMCRI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: CSIR CSMCRI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 62 Project Assistant, Project Associate and More Posts
